basic_details.job_title: HAL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Visiting Consultant / Clinical Psychologist Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree / Diploma in Relevant specialty / discipline, Post-Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology or any other Qualification approved by R.C.I
qualification.details: Visiting Consultant (Radiologist) on part time basis: PG Degree / Diploma in Relevant specialty / discipline. Minimum 5 (Five) years post qualification experience. Visiting Consultant (Orthopaedician) on part time basis: PG Degree / Diploma in Relevant specialty / discipline. Minimum 5 (Five) years post qualification experience. Clinical Psychologist on Part-Time basis: A Post-Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology or any other Qualification approved by R.C.I (Rehabilitation Council of India) for Registration. Minimum 1 (One) year post qualification experience after RCI Registration.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Visiting Consultant (Radiologist) on part time basis
Visiting Consultant (Orthopaedician) on part time basis

salary_details.visiting consultant (radiologist) on par: Rs. 3,500/- per visit. Conveyance Charges: Rs. 18/- per km. However, minimum reimbursement would be Rs. 250/- per visit.
salary_details.visiting consultant (orthopaedician) on: Rs. 3,500/- per visit. Conveyance Charges: Rs. 18/- per km. However, minimum reimbursement would be Rs. 250/- per visit.
salary_details.clinical psychologist on part-time basis: Rs. 1,000/- per visit. Conveyance Charges: Reimbursement will be paid @ Rs.18 per Km. However, minimum reimbursement would be Rs. 150/- per visit.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on relevant experience/marks Personal Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HAL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.hal-india.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the HAL Visiting Consultant / Clinical Psychologist posts is 24th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Visiting Consultant and Clinical Psychologist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Clinical Psychologist post?
faq.answer: A Post-Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology or any other Qualification approved by R.C.I is required, along with at least one year of post-qualification experience after RCI Registration.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Visiting Consultant (Radiologist) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Visiting Consultant (Radiologist) is Rs. 3,500/- per visit, with conveyance charges reimbursement.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting based on relevant experience/marks, followed by a personal interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the HAL official website, and the link is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these HAL posts?
faq.answer: The job type for these posts is Part Time.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the HAL recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for HAL Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500042.
